storyboard.content: I have been having a mild cough for the past 3 weeks.
I have been getting short of breath when I exert myself, like climbing stairs.
I have developed a mild wheezing sound when I breathe, which is new for me.
The cough, shortness of breath, and wheezing have all been present for about 3 weeks and seem stable.
The symptoms are mild. I can do everyday things but strenuous activity is harder than before.
I am a 48-year-old man. I do not smoke. I work in a dusty environment.
I do not have a fever.
